context.text:
Bigger context windows are good.

Filling them with low-signal context isn't.

Context windows are growing ~30× a year. But a bigger window doesn’t make every token useful. The model still has to process the junk.

The future isn't less context.

It's less waste. https://t.co/TS8JU43qzK

context.text:
AI agents should have a context label.

Like nutrition facts, but for information:

sources
freshness
citations
cost
confidence
failure modes

If the label is empty, the agent should not act.

Desearch is built around context agents can inspect.

#AISearch #AIAgents #Desearch https://t.co/paUGJ3wFwP

context.text:
We designed Arion to survive 66% node loss.

10 data shards + 20 parity shards per file.
Reconstruct from any 10 of 30.

Lose 20 miners simultaneously. Data intact.

IPFS can't say that.

#Hippius #SN75 $TAO https://t.co/0HCfAiq9cb

🚀 Hippius milestone this month: 100 TB of egress served across the network.

Arion monitors every shard, continuously.

Miner goes offline → validator detects degradation → downloads 10 healthy sha

- Emitter resume after a crashed re-run
- Event backfill for missed completions
